caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the front, and a gold chain is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing silver over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. Behind him is a white wall featuring the word "HUSTLE" and a row of stars, while a screen to his right displays the text "BOSS TALK 101." Two overlays are present on the screen: one on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right says "BOSS TALK 101." The man is looking toward the left side of the frame with a neutral expression. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary in his seat, and the camera angle and composition stay constant, showing no visible movement or change in the scene.
